mapper.select: SELECT f.file_id , f.logical_name , f.is_deleted , f.created_at , t.task_id , t.task_title , f.project_id , p.project_title , fv.version_id , fv.version_number , fv.file_size , fv.uploader , fv.uploaded_at , u.user_name , tk.type_name FROM files f LEFT JOIN task t ON f.task_id = t.task_id LEFT JOIN project p ON f.project_id = p.project_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT file_id , version_id , version_number , file_size , uploader , uploaded_at FROM file_versions WHERE (file_id, version_number) IN ( SELECT file_id, MAX(version_number) FROM file_versions GROUP BY file_id ) ) fv ON f.file_id = fv.file_id LEFT JOIN users u ON fv.uploader = u.user_code LEFT JOIN task_types tk ON tk.type_id = t.type_id WHERE f.is_deleted = 'N' AND f.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC, TO_NUMBER(f.file_id) DESC

SELECT f.file_id , f.task_id , f.post_id , f.logical_name , f.is_deleted , f.created_at , t.task_title , p.project_title , fv.version_number , fv.file_size , fv.uploader , fv.uploaded_at , u.user_name , tk.type_name FROM files f LEFT JOIN task t ON f.task_id = t.task_id LEFT JOIN project p ON f.project_id = p.project_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT file_id , version_number , file_size , uploader , uploaded_at FROM file_versions WHERE (file_id, version_number) IN ( SELECT file_id, MAX(version_number) FROM file_versions GROUP BY file_id ) ) fv ON f.file_id = fv.file_id LEFT JOIN users u ON fv.uploader = u.user_code LEFT JOIN task_types tk ON tk.type_id = t.type_id WHERE f.file_id = #{fileId}

SELECT fv.version_id , fv.file_id , fv.version_number , fv.file_path , fv.file_size , fv.uploader , fv.uploaded_at , fv.saved_name FROM file_versions fv LEFT JOIN files f ON fv.file_id = f.file_id LEFT JOIN task t ON f.task_id = t.task_id LEFT JOIN task_types tk ON t.type_id = tk.type_id WHERE fv.file_id = #{fileId} AND fv.saved_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY fv.version_number
SELECT fv.version_id , fv.file_id , fv.version_number , fv.file_path , fv.file_size , fv.uploader , fv.uploaded_at , fv.saved_name FROM file_versions fv WHERE fv.version_id = #{versionId}
SELECT MAX(version_number) FROM file_versions WHERE file_id = #{fileId}
SELECT fv.version_id , fv.file_id , fv.saved_name , fv.file_path , f.logical_name FROM file_versions fv LEFT JOIN files f ON fv.file_id = f.file_id WHERE fv.version_id = #{versionId}

SELECT h.history_id , h.version_id , h.downloader , u.user_name AS downloaderName , f.logical_name , t.task_id , t.task_title , fv.file_size , fv.version_number , h.downloaded_at FROM file_download_history h JOIN file_versions fv ON h.version_id = fv.version_id JOIN files f ON fv.file_id = f.file_id LEFT JOIN task t ON f.task_id = t.task_id LEFT JOIN users u ON h.downloader = u.user_code WHERE f.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY h.downloaded_at DESC, TO_NUMBER(h.history_id) DESC
